title: System Application Engineer [ Electrical] | Up to $5K | 5 Days | Jurong East - 0310
description:
System Application Engineer [ Electrical ]

  • 5 Days per week
  • SG Office: Jurong East - Tradehub 21 [ Travelling within SG is required ]
  • Basic Salary: $3,000 - $5,000 + 14 Days AL + $500 Medical Benefits + Performance Bonus
  • Bachelor’s degree or higher in Electrical Engineering or a related field.
  • Min 1-3 years of working experience in electrical field.
  • This role is required to visit site [ SG ] if required
  • Opportunity to travel globally [ Thailand, UAE ... ] for system evaluations, custom installations, and training purposes.

Interested applicants can also send your resume to (Liwenpoh741#gmail.com) and allow our consultant to match you with our clients. No Charges will be incurred by Candidates for any service rendered.

WA ME 9735 4019 for more System Application Engineer [ Electrical] role

Key Responsibilities

  • Design and improve X-ray scan systems for car park surveillance system or scanning system in Airport or Checkpoint, including building prototypes and testing new designs.
  • Write manufacturing and test procedures for equipment.
  • Install, repair, and maintain equipment in the field while providing customer training as needed.
  • Train manufacturing personnel on assembly and testing of products.
  • Assist in integrating software with electrical control systems.
  • Provide organized documentation for analysis and recommend design improvements.
  • Assemble, test, and troubleshoot product designs, offering constructive feedback.
  • Evaluate product performance using field data and recommend modifications or improvements.
  • Perform other duties as required.

Must familiar to one of the skills set below

  • FPGA / DSP / MCU design expertise.
  • Experience with interface applications such as Ethernet or PCI.
  • Proficiency in programming languages like C++/C# or HDL language.
  • Familiarity with electronic testing equipment (e.g., oscilloscopes, digital multi-meters).

POH LI WEN REG NO: R25136683

THE SUPREMEHR ADVISORY PTE LTD EA NO: 14C7279
